SMB Energy Optimizer: AI that learns HVAC and lighting patterns from smart meter data and low-cost sensors to cut electricity costs by 10-20% for European office buildings, with utility demand-response integration.

DermAssist Lite: a privacy-preserving on-device dermatology triage bot for EU clinics and patients that classifies common skin conditions offline, routes edge cases to dermatologists, and pursues a CE-marked class I/IIa path.

CSRD Navigator for SMEs: a B2B SaaS that connects to accounting systems and utility bills to automate CSRD-aligned ESG disclosures for EU small businesses, producing auditor-ready reports and evidence trails.
